title: CANVAKIT.md frontmatter (AIP-5)
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter portion of an AIP-5 *.canvakit.* template.

schema.description: Spec version pin. Hosts that find an unknown schema MUST refuse rather than guess.

template.description: Required marker. Tooling that loads files by glob uses this to catch 'renamed but not a template' mistakes.

name.description: Slug-safe machine name. Lowercase, digits, dashes.

version.description: Semver. Bump on breaking change to the rendered shape or variables contract.

description.description: One-sentence purpose for the gallery card.

author.description: Optional locally; required for gallery publish — (author, name, version) is the canonical key.

renderer.description: Template engine. v1 default 'mustache' is universally supported; others are spec-legal but optional.

design.description: Designkit fallback hint. Used only when no workspace design is active. Schemes: dk:<preset>, ws:<path>, kit:<slug>, or a bare *.md path.

forceDesign.description: Designkit override. Bypasses workspace selection. Same scheme grammar as 'design'.

refreshEvery.description: Declarative cadence hint. Honored opportunistically; runtimes that can't honor SHOULD treat as 'manual'.

variables.description: Caller inputs with author defaults. Substituted into sources params before resolution.

sources.description: Named data sources resolved in parallel and merged into the render context.

imports.description: Nested canvases. Each renders in isolation; output exposed under {{{imports.<name>}}}.

metadata.description: Host-specific extension surface. Other hosts MUST tolerate unknown metadata.<host>.* keys.

source.description: Discriminated by 'kind'. One of: tool, static, file, query.

ref.description: Tool identifier. Flat ('searchFlights'), namespaced ('stripe.mrr'), or MCP-qualified ('mcp://server/tool'). Resolution: exact > longest wildcard > MCP.

params.description: JSON params passed verbatim to the resolver. String values may interpolate {{variables.*}}.

args.description: Legacy alias for 'params'. Hosts SHOULD accept and warn.

value.description: Literal pass-through. Never fetched, never parsed.

path.description: Filesystem path relative to the render filesystem. Parsed by extension per the format contract.

include.description: Glob or array of globs. Bare directory paths are rewritten to <path>/**/*.md.

where.description: Field predicates against parsed shape. Supports equality and operators _in, _contains, _before, _after.

sort.description: field (asc) or -field (desc) on a parsed key.

fields.description: Project to a subset of parsed keys.

variables.description: Values passed to the imported canvas. Imports do NOT inherit parent variables; pass explicitly.
